title: Principal Instructional Designer at Arihant Publications

jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at Arihant Publications
jsonLd.description:
Arihant Publications invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Nagpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Arihant Publications:
Arihant Publications is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arihant Publications!
